_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Instrument | Registration/Reporting Obligation | Applies to Workspace Directly? | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| PPWR (EU) 2025/40 | EPR producer registration per Member State | Conditional on "producer" classification | Legal Confirmation Required |
| CBAM (EU) 2023/956 | CBAM declarant authorisation; quarterly reports from 2026 | Conditional on role as importer/customs rep for covered goods | Legal Confirmation Required |
| EU ETS (Maritime) | No direct obligation on forwarders; carriers report | No direct registration obligation | Monitor carrier pass-through |
| FuelEU Maritime | No direct obligation on forwarders; vessel operators report | No direct registration obligation | Monitor carrier pass-through |
| ReFuelEU Aviation | No direct obligation on forwarders; fuel suppliers and airlines report | No direct registration obligation | Monitor airline surcharges |
| UCC / ICS2 | ENS pre-arrival filing for air cargo imported to EU | Yes, when acting as customs representative for air imports | In force |
| EU Transport Emissions Accounting (pending) | GHG emissions data per transport service to clients | Yes, when adopted — as transport service provider | Pending OJ publication |

*Sources: Regulation (EU) 2025/40, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2025/40/oj/eng. Regulation (EU) 2023/956, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R0956. EC CBAM Portal, https://taxation-customs.ec.europa.eu/carbon-border-adjustment-mechanism_en. Regulation (EU) No 952/2013 (UCC), https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX%3A32013R0952. ICS2 portal, https://taxation-customs.ec.europa.eu/customs/customs-security/import-control-system-2_en. COM(2023) 441, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=comnat:COM_2023_0441_FIN.*
